name: Schedule Acceleration Assistant
description: Detects schedule slippage and recommends recovery actions: task parallelization, scope reduction, and agent/resource deployment

baselineSlippageThreshold.title: Baseline Slippage Threshold
baselineSlippageThreshold.description: Minimum percentage of schedule buffer consumed to trigger acceleration analysis

riskWarningThreshold.title: Risk Warning Threshold
riskWarningThreshold.description: Brooks' Law risk threshold: adding > N agents yields < M% net time savings to trigger a warning

criticalPathRefreshInterval.title: Critical Path Refresh Interval
criticalPathRefreshInterval.description: Hours between automatic critical path recomputations (0 = disabled)
